manifest.notes: Active deployment path is main -> sync-dashboard-branches.yml -> gh-pages / root because GitHub Pages currently reports build_type=legacy and source=gh-pages. Root index.html is a no-cache bootloader with stale service-worker/cache cleanup. data.json is generated from Hermes canonical state and task counts may change when Telegram/Hermes updates tasks.
